features.description: Base capability. Always on across every tier. Enables the branch CRUD surface + the default-branch invariant.
Allow more than one open/close period per day (e.g. 9-12, 17-22). Off on small tier — small-tier tenants have a single period per day. Backed by the `branch_multi_period_hours` entitlement.

Resolve `address` → `coordinates` automatically via a subprocessor (Google Maps / Mapbox / Nominatim). Off on small tier — small-tier tenants pin the map manually. Backed by the `branch_geocoding` entitlement.

Enforce `capacity` on booking-adjacent write routes via `CapacityGate`. Off by default across all tiers; opt-in on Medium + Enterprise via the entitlements admin UI. When off, capacity is display-only.
Add amenity tags outside the platform catalogue. Enterprise only. Backed by the `branch_amenities: custom` entitlement.

Enable the map-view SDUI screen for the branch list. Renders every branch as a pin on a Mapbox / OpenStreetMap tile layer. Available across every tier; the map tile subprocessor is billed to the platform.

Expose selected branches on a public tenant directory URL (no auth). Deferred beyond Wave 2 — this feature key is reserved so the SDUI + settings surface can hint at future availability without shipping the endpoint.
